meta.title: The Analysis of Fear
meta.sourceDoc: 84. P3 - The Analysis of Fear 猴子恐惧实验.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: The Analysis of Fear 猴子恐惧实验

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：B
PDF 定位：Over the years, the majority of people acquire a range of skills forcopingwithfrighteningsituations(第1段首句)
PDF 解析：句子直陈"大多数人逐渐获得一套应对恐惧情境的策略"，与选项B "mosthumans develop strategies fordealingwith fear"完全对 应。其他选项：A未提；C只举boss/stranger作为例子，并未比较 场景；D与原文相反。

题目 28
答案：C
PDF 定位：These animals undergo many of the same physiologicaland psychological developmental stages that humans do, but in a morecompressed time span.(第2段)
PDF 解析：句子说明恒河猴的心理/生理发育阶段与人类"十分相似" (resembles)，故选C。A、B、D均未在文中提及。

题目 29
答案：D
PDF 定位：With such information in hand, they could then proceed to
PDF 解析：研究框架：①找出触发恐惧的线索并识别相应行为（A/B）→②确定

题目 30
答案：A
PDF 定位：These positions are no more frightening than those that primates encounter frequently in the wild, or those that human infants meetwhenevertheyare leftata day-care centre.(第4段末句)
PDF 解析：作者强调这三种情境只是猴子在野外、婴儿在托儿所都会经常遇到 的常见经历，因此选A"reflectcommonexperiencesforinfant humansandmonkeys"。选项D中的"graded"（分级）原文并未提 到；B、C同样无据。

questionSections.text:
题目 31
答案：C
PDF 定位：stare
PDF 解析："several hostile gestures: barking ... staring back."

题目 32
答案：B
PDF 定位：no-eye-contact
PDF 解析："reduced their activity greatly and sometimes froze ...

题目 33
答案：C
PDF 定位：stare
PDF 解析："... mixed the threatening displays with submissive ones ...

题目 34
答案：A
PDF 定位：alone
PDF 解析："yearns to regain the closeness ... draw the mother's attention."

题目 35
答案：A
PDF 定位：alone
PDF 解析："emitted frequent gentle 'coo' calls ...

questionSections.text:
题目 36
答案：age
PDF 定位：age
PDF 解析：... grouped the monkeys according to their age ...

题目 37
答案：two weeks
PDF 定位：two weeks
PDF 解析："infants in the youngest group (no more than two weeks old)..."

题目 38
答案：human beings
PDF 定位：human beings
PDF 解析："... seemed to be unaware of the human beings who were around them."

题目 39
答案：good motor control
PDF 定位：good motor control
PDF 解析："Babies in the two intermediate-age groups had good motor control ..."

题目 40
答案：mature monkeys
PDF 定位：mature monkeys
PDF 解析："... reactions were ... identical to those of mature monkeys."
